yaptastic session:

Good day my dearest gooners and goonettes, today i want to yap about the absolute masterpiece that the Blue Lock manga is. Second of all, I know that there's a lot of yaoi jokes about Blue Lock, but the shit they say and do is just too much for it to be a joke. Isagi is basically a harem mc at this point. He got Kaiser, Bachira, Kurona, Hiori and Rin as a valid ship, not like a ship because they had one single gay moment, but a ship because they all almost kissed Isagi atleast once, Bachira because no shit, Kurona cuz he's my fav and he deserves to be a main ship fuck you, Hiori because of "Let's meet eachother... Beyond our wildest dreams!!!" and Rin because that's basically a tsundere x tsundere relationship. It might as well just be a normal ass yaoi, but the problem is that the soccer part is actually extremely well made. The goals feel like they have an actual impact, every goal chance is not just one shot that either is blocked or not, it's "He's about to score!" and "Holy shit is that a fucking kaiju?". The illustrations are next level, if the mob psycho manga is a 1/10 and the one punch man manga is a 10/10 then it's genuinely a 9/10. IT'S SO FUCKING HYPE AND GOATED AND COOL AND SEXY AND YAOI!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
